ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(RecordType.Name = "Competitive Request", TEXT( Validation_Code__c ) = "Closed", OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(Purpose__c)),ISBLANK(TEXT(Audience__c )),ISBLANK(TEXT(Audience_Level__c )),ISBLANK( TEXT(Audience_Type__c ))))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: When closing a Competitive SR please ensure Purpose, Audience, Audience Level, and Audience Type are also completed.
